recent_findings.name: CatBoost 35% blend
recent_findings.interpretation: Nearby CatBoost-weight probe; public score regressed versus the 30% CatBoost anchor.

recent_findings.name: CatBoost horizon ramp
recent_findings.interpretation: Meaningful secondary private-LB hedge, but weaker than the 30% public anchor.

recent_findings.name: CatBoost tail2737 rerun
recent_findings.interpretation: Legal rerun, not submitted; supports the CatBoost hypothesis but does not change the anchor.

recent_findings.name: LGBM micro rolling rerun
recent_findings.interpretation: Strong local diagnostic/blend input; needs Kaggle or pseudo-private evidence before becoming an anchor.

recent_findings.name: GRU family public readout
recent_findings.interpretation: Risk-ranked GRU stack and raw GRU probes failed public transfer on 2026-05-23; pause GRU-family submissions.

implementation_summary: Direct-horizon boosted-tree models with leakage-aware 91-day-gapped score-history features and LGB/XGB/CatBoost ensembling.
validation_note: Holdout and rolling-origin local MAE are not directly comparable; Kaggle public/private leaderboard results are the external generalization checks.
banned_current_state_phrases: Current status: reproducible best legal public MAE = **0.8232**
